'''Arcan IV''', sometimes known simply as '''Arcan''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
One of the original member-worlds of the [[Kingdom of Cron]], it was absorbed into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]]. After the empire collapsed, it would continue to thrive as a world, eventually joining the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Located along the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]], it was the principal spaceport of the Mandate.

By the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Arcan IV's commercial district served as a den of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], thieves, and [[Con artist/Legends|con artists]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] once went there looking for clues to the whereabouts of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Later, Han Solo and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] went there during their quest to seek out the [[Dancing Goddess/Legends|Dancing Goddess]].
